rounds.title: Rnd 1
rounds.sourceText: with green, make a slip knot and ch 14; sl st in the first ch you made, to join the piece in a circle; [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle] 14 times (work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle) (14 chain-loops made)

statements.sourceText: with green, make a slip knot

operation.instruction: make a slip knot with green yarn

statements.sourceText: sl st in the first ch you made, to join the piece in a circle

operation.note: to join the piece in a circle

statements.sourceText: [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle] 14 times
sl st in the next ch of the circle

body.sourceText: [ch 3, sl st in the next ch of the circle]

statements.sourceText: work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle

note.message: work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle
note.sourceText: work your last sl st into the st that joined the circle
